Easy: Why do you want to work as a Software Engineer?
How do you stay updated with new technologies?
Medium: Describe a challenging project you worked on.
How do you handle tight deadlines?
Tell me about a time you worked in a team.
How do you handle criticism from teammates?
Hard: Describe a failure in your career and what you learned.
How do you manage conflicts in a development team?
Tell me about a time you had to learn a technology quickly.
How would you handle a project that is falling behind schedule?

Easy: Why did you choose Data Science as a career?
What tools do you use for data analysis?
Tell me about your experience with datasets.
What motivates you in a data science role?
Medium: Describe a data science project you worked on.
How do you explain complex models to non-technical people?
How do you handle missing data?
How do you prioritize tasks in a project?
Hard: Tell me about a failed model you built and why it failed.
How do you handle disagreements about model results?
Describe a time you improved a model’s performance.
How do you ensure ethical use of data?

Easy: Why do you enjoy frontend development?
What frontend frameworks have you used?
How do you ensure a good user experience?
Tell me about your favorite frontend project.
Medium: Describe a UI challenge you solved.
How do you handle feedback from designers?
How do you optimize website performance?
How do you manage cross-browser compatibility?
Hard: Describe a time you redesigned a poor user interface.
How do you manage complex frontend state?
How do you deal with performance issues in large apps?
Tell me about a time you improved accessibility.
